next_step: Fix React hydration warnings + design Firestore audio tagging schema

last_push.commit_message:
feat: Sprint 2 & 3 — feedback, feature flags, polish for friend testing

Added thumbs up/down feedback on chat responses (message_feedback
collection + matching Firestore rule), introduced a feature-flag
module to gate all V2 surfaces (Speech Lab, progress dashboard, XP)
off by default without deleting code, and gave /progress a clean
placeholder instead of mock curriculum data when disabled.

Ran a full regression pass (all 3 starter prompts, feedback writes,
desktop + mobile viewport), built a review_feedback.ts script so Ali
can read ratings without the Firebase console, and fixed a real
console error: Firebase Auth's signInWithPopup was blocked by
Next.js's default COOP header, now set to same-origin-allow-popups.
Also completed the @google/genai SDK migration in sync_audio.ts,
which had been missed in Sprint 1's route-level migration.

Logged the Sprint 2 & 3 review in Master.md.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
